bird.name: 黑鹮
bird.summary: 黑鹮（学名：Pseudibis papillosa）为鹮科黑鹮属的鸟类。分布于缅甸、越南以及中国大陆的云南等地，多见于栖息在沼泽、湿地、水田、河湖、溪流附近。该物种的模式产地在印度和斯里兰卡。 保护 中国国家重点保护动物等级：二级 亚种 黑鹮云南亚种（学名：Pseudibis…

locations.name: 阿拉瓦利嶺
locations.summary: 阿拉瓦利嶺（印地語：अरावली Arāvalī，英語：Aravalli Range），又译阿拉瓦利山脉，是印度的山脈，全長約800公里，橫跨古吉拉特邦、拉賈斯坦邦、哈里亞納邦和德里，最高點海拔高度1,722米，山體由變質岩組成。 参考文…

locations.name: 湖泊
locations.summary: 湖泊（lake）是内陆洼地中相对静止、有一定面积，不与海洋发生直接联系的水体。全世界共有约1.17亿个湖泊，共覆盖了地球近500万平方公里。 從地球歷史上來看，湖泊只是暫時存在的水體，會受到泥沙淤積而慢慢陸化；除了少數古老湖泊，如貝加爾湖…

locations.name: 草沼
locations.summary: 草沼即草本沼泽（英語：marsh），也叫草泽，是一种主要生长草本植物的湿地，多半可以發現在湖岸或河岸邊，介於水生與陸生生態系統的過渡，一般未被淹没，但土壤维持水浸状态。优势植物有苔草、莎草和灯芯草等，另外也會有低矮的灌木生長。和草沼不同，…

relations.subject: 黑鹮
relations.evidence: The red-naped ibis is widely distributed in the plains of the Indian subcontinent. In Rajasthan, it is common along the Aravalli mountains but entirely avoids using the trees on the mountains. The red-naped ibis uses lakes, marshes, riverbeds, irrigated farmlands, dry fallow fields, villages, towns and cities. More wetlands on the landscape attract a greater number of red-naped ibises, but birds forage largely in dry fields increasing use of wetlands for foraging during summer. In semi-arid areas, it is commonly seen in small flocks of 2–4, which could be family groups, with larger groups being relatively rare.{{Cite journal |last1=Ameta |first1=Hitesh |last2=Koli |first2=Vijay Kumar |last3=Kittur |first3=Swati |last4=Sundar |first4=K

relations.subject: 黑鹮
relations.evidence: Unlike other ibises in the region it is not found very often in waterbodies and is often found in dry fields, but are attracted more to areas that have more wetlands
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 黑鹮
relations.evidence: thumb|A pair of Red Naped Ibises at Mehtab Bagh, [[Agra]] The species has declined greatly in Pakistan due to hunting and habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 黑鹮
relations.evidence: thumb|A pair of Red Naped Ibises at Mehtab Bagh, [[Agra]] The species has declined greatly in Pakistan due to hunting and habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
